commands.name: npx create-react-app
commands.description: Create a new React application using Create React App scaffolding tool

commands.name: react-scripts start
commands.description: Starts the development server with hot module replacement on port 3000

commands.name: react-scripts build
commands.description: Builds the app for production to the build folder. Bundles React in production mode and optimizes for best performance

commands.name: react-scripts test
commands.description: Launches the test runner in interactive watch mode using Jest

commands.name: react-scripts eject
commands.description: Removes the single build dependency and copies all configuration files and transitive dependencies (webpack, Babel, ESLint, etc.) directly into the project. This is a one-way operation

commands.name: npm create vite@latest -- --template react
commands.description: Creates a new Vite-powered React project with fast HMR and optimized builds

commands.name: vite
commands.description: Starts the Vite development server with instant hot module replacement

commands.name: vite build
commands.description: Builds the Vite React application for production

commands.name: vite preview
commands.description: Preview the production build locally

commands.name: jest
commands.description: Run React component tests using Jest testing framework

commands.name: react-devtools
commands.description: Launches standalone React DevTools for debugging React applications

commands.name: npx @testing-library/react
commands.description: React Testing Library for writing maintainable component tests

commands.name: npx storybook init
commands.description: Initialize Storybook for React component development and documentation

commands.name: npm install react react-dom
commands.description: Install React core packages into an existing project

commands.name: npm install react-router-dom
commands.description: Install React Router for client-side routing

commands.name: npx vitest
commands.description: Run React tests with Vitest, a Vite-native test runner

commands.name: npx playwright test
commands.description: Run end-to-end tests for React applications using Playwright

commands.name: npx next create-next-app
commands.description: Create a Next.js React application with server-side rendering

commands.name: eslint --ext .jsx,.tsx
commands.description: Lint React JSX and TSX files using ESLint with React plugin

commands.name: source-map-explorer
commands.description: Analyze React bundle size and dependencies
